name: Chandan Kumar
title: First Year B.Tech CSE-IoT Student
tagline: Building thoughtful digital experiences with code and creativity.
bio: I'm a first-year Computer Science (IoT) student at Techno Main Salt Lake, Kolkata, passionate about building clean, modern web applications and exploring AI-driven experiences. Originally from Darbhanga, Bihar, I enjoy solving real-world problems through technology while continuously learning and improving my craft.
